hero.name: Allan Oshima

agents.label: Zone 2
agents.title: The Forest of Agents
agents.subtitle: AI agents and automation — my specialty

origin.about: I'm a Senior AI/ML Computational Science Analyst at Accenture. I build GenAI and intelligent-automation solutions — AI agents, conversational flows and chatbots for customer service, sales and operational support. I also work in observability and AIOps, sustaining mission-critical environments with monitoring, intelligent incident response and remediation automation.
origin.education: B.Sc. in Computer Science — Cruzeiro do Sul. Cambridge Certificate (English) — CNA.

agents.intro: This is my specialty. Here live the AI agents and automations I designed and shipped to production — from autonomous AIOps root-cause analysis to agent swarms that sell, support and process documents on their own.
agents.confidentialNote: Enterprise engagement — client and sensitive details anonymized.

builds.intro: End-to-end products I designed, built and shipped — most running on GCP (Cloud Run / Firebase). From storefront to checkout, from chatbot to admin panel.
